message:
fix(web): replace header DB status dev-speak with user-friendly text

Changed header subtitle from technical "db: ready/cached/loading/error/idle"
to user-friendly messaging:
- Loading: "Loading..."
- Ready/Cached/Idle: No subtitle (clean UI when working normally)
- Error: No subtitle (already shown via DataLoadingOverlay)

Fixes: phage_explorer-s4qx.6.3.1
